race.name: Muju Gran Fondo
race.tagline: South Korea's largest road cycling race in scenic Muju County[6].

vitals.location: Muju County, North Jeolla Province, South Korea

climate.overview: May in Muju typically features mild temperatures (15-25°C) with possible rain, though the event is scheduled for October suggesting cooler conditions.

terrain.overview: Mountainous roads in Muju County, likely featuring climbs through national park areas.

logistics.explanation: Limited airport access but scenic rural location; nearest major hub is distant[6].

length.explanation: Solid gran fondo distance at 130 km provides a full-day challenge.

technicality.explanation: Primarily road with moderate mountainous demands; not highly technical[6].

elevation.explanation: 2,000 m gain offers respectable climbing without extremes.

climate.explanation: Mild but variable weather in October; cooler than May ideal.

adventure.explanation: National park setting adds scenic adventure[6].

prestige.explanation: Claimed as Korea's largest road race[6].

race_quality.explanation: Emerging event with potential but limited history.

experience.explanation: Promising for international riders in Korea.

community.explanation: Strong local cycling scene implied by size[6].

field_depth.explanation: Large field expected as country's biggest[6].

value.explanation: Comparable to regional events; costs unknown.

expenses.explanation: Travel to Korea moderate; event fees likely affordable.

cultural_impact.explanation: Regional significance in Korean cycling; not globally iconic.

biased_opinion.overview: An emerging gem in South Korea's gran fondo scene, Muju Gran Fondo stands out as the country's largest road cycling event, set against Muju's mountainous backdrop. While details are sparse and it lacks the pedigree of established races, its national park vibes and solid 130 km/2,000 m profile make it a worthwhile adventure for riders seeking new horizons in Asia. Prestige at 3 reflects its local dominance, but watch for growth[6].

final_verdict.one_liner: Korea's biggest road gran fondo: solid climbs, big fields, untapped potential.
final_verdict.full_verdict: Muju Gran Fondo delivers a respectable challenge in a stunning location but suffers from limited published details and no confirmed history or options. Ideal for explorers; verify updates closer to date[2][6].

logistics.overview: Rural location requires planning; fly into regional airports and arrange ground transport.
logistics.accommodation: Resorts and hotels in Deogyusan National Park area.
logistics.registration_notes: Details unavailable; check Gran Fondo Guide for 2025 updates[6].

history.overview: Limited information; listed for 2025 as Korea's largest road cycling race. No confirmed founding in 2022 or international status.

course_description.character: Mountainous road loops through Muju County, emphasizing climbs in a national park setting.
course_description.signature_challenge: Cumulative 2,000 m elevation across 130 km in scenic terrain.

non_negotiables: Verify event status and route details
Book travel early for rural access

youtube_data.search_query: Muju Gran Fondo gran fondo cycling Muju County

videos.title: 2023 Grand Rapids Grand Fondo 80 mile - Entire route.
videos.description:
First time riding in this event. Nice event and great atmosphere + food and drink + music at the finish line (included in your registration). Would do it again next year if I have chance. Recommended! Even you don't race or ride very fast, the finish line festival is one of the best.
The best deal that worth the money and feeling special in my opinion is the police motorcycle lead and block the intersections if you have strong legs to keep up with main (fast) peloton. It's my first time riding with police escort.
Mandatory and long rest stop half way (for fast group, it's about 15 minutes wait), so (a tad) slower group can rejoin and go out again with the police lead in 2nd half. I got drop early 1st half due to the group get stretched out and I was not commit soon enough. 2nd half I was better prepared mentally and keep up to the end, except I don't have sprint left. even 200 watts feel miserable at the final half mile to go.
Hitting 35+ mph (55+ km/h) in the city streets is feeling exciting (and to be honest, quite nervous).

videos.title: 2025 무주 그란폰도·메디오폰도 대회 19일 개최
videos.description:
국내 최대 길거리 자전거 경주인 '무주 그란폰도·메디오폰도
자전거대회'가 오는 19일 무주에서 열립니다.

올해는 선수 1천 800여 명을 비롯해 지도자와 가족, 그
리고 대회 관계자 등 3천여 명이 참여할 예정입니다.

그란폰도 거리는 총 124.5km로 무주 예체문화관을 출발
해 부남면, 안성면, 설천면을 거쳐 무주국민체육센터로 돌아
오는 코스며, 메디오폰도는 설천면 하조 사거리에서 그란폰도
선수들과 분리돼 적상면을 거쳐 무주국민체육센터까지 총 7
0.5km를 달리게 됩니다.

한편 그란폰도는 이탈리아어로 '긴 거리를 이동한다'는 뜻입니다.

videos.title: Gran Fondo BIANCHI: DOUBLE DEVIL- TEASER
videos.description: The Bianchi Gran Fondo 2016 will take place on the 29th of May at the Royal Welsh Showground, Builth Wells, Wales. With the long route (121 miles) taking in both the Devil's Staircase and Devil's Elbow, hence the tag, it's not a challenge for the weak of knee.
